channel.title: Posts on Lottery of Babylonian variations
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Lottery of Babylonian variations

item.title: Bayesian modeling of global trend, local variation, seasonality, and heterogeneity in time series
item.description: In this post we’ll implement a time series framework based on a flexible smoothed exponential process. The framework can be used to model global trend, local variation, seasonality and other features that are essential for flexible time series data modeling.

item.title: Les institutions (II)
item.description: Une caractérisation générique de la culture occidentale, un extrait de The Way of Zen de Alan Watts.

item.title: Les institutions (I)
item.description: Le Taoïsme, le Confucianisme et ses fonctions différentes dans la société chinoise, un extrait de The Way of Zen de Alan Watts.

item.title: Wang Ziyou
item.description: Un extrait de 世说新语，任誕第二十三.

item.title: The Pest
item.description: This is a primer on Bayesian model building and inference.

item.title: Xun Jubo
item.description: Un extrait de 世说新语，德行第一.
